purpose: Plain-language product standards for AI-readable product review. They explain how a Capability Gap run proves design, execution, acceptance, feedback, and deliverable quality without relying on hidden protocol knowledge.
audience: external product reviewer and AI reviewer

standards.label: 设计标准
standards.plainLanguageQuestion: 这次运行有没有先说明用户真正要什么、缺什么能力、为什么选这条路线？
standards.passStandard: 报告必须同时展示 Critical summary, Fetch evidence, GapDecision, selected owner, rejected unsafe or weaker routes, and graph branch.
standards.failStandard: 只给结论、不解释能力缺口、不说明 owner 或 graph branch，就不能算设计完成。

standards.label: 执行标准
standards.plainLanguageQuestion: 判断之后有没有产出能交给下一位 owner 做的具体东西？
standards.passStandard: 每个 GapDecision 都必须有 DecisionOutput，写清 owner, scope, deliverable, inputs, outputs, forbidden behavior, and verification policy.
standards.failStandard: 只有建议、没有下一步交付物，或者治理 agent 被当成执行 worker，就不能算执行完成。

standards.label: 验收标准
standards.plainLanguageQuestion: 我们怎么知道它真的跑对了，而不是看起来像对？
standards.passStandard: R-001 through R-010 must have auditable pass/fail checks, owner, returnToStage, and quantitative evidence. Full completion also requires smoke or release verification.
standards.failStandard: 只说测试通过但没有对应 R 项、量化指标、失败返回阶段或 owner，就不能算验收完成。

standards.label: 反馈标准
standards.plainLanguageQuestion: 用户纠正会不会改变下一次判断，而不是只留在聊天里？
standards.passStandard: 报告必须展示 userCorrection replay, decisionChangedByCorrection, repeatKey, promotion review candidate, and no automatic canonical write.
standards.failStandard: 只记录用户说过什么，但下一次 decision 不受影响，或重复 3 次后直接自动写 canonical，就不能算反馈完成。

standards.label: 交付内容标准
standards.plainLanguageQuestion: 它最后给用户和系统留下了哪些可读、可查、可复盘的交付内容？
standards.passStandard: 每次完整产品运行必须生成 JSON artifact, Chinese Markdown report, SQLite run record, productArtifacts, scorecards, analytics, graph validation, and evidence commands.
standards.failStandard: 只有聊天总结、只有原始 JSON、没有 runId/report/db/evidence，或报告泄露本机路径、凭证、私有来源，就不能算交付完成。
